title: Virtuoso 7.1 Ignores literals schema
description:
Given the command:
                            INSERT {
                                GRAPH <http://www.example.com/>  {
<#book2> <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/title>  "David Copperfield"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string>.
<#book2> <http://www.example.com/Int32> 789  .
<#book2> <http://www.example.com/Double> "23"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#double> .
<#book2> <http://www.example.com/Float> "23"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#float> .
<#book2> <http://www.example.com/Decimal> "0"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#decimal>  .
<#book2> <http://www.example.com/DateTime> "2014-06-17T12:08:26.7675955+03:00"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#dateTime> .

                                }
                                }

followed by a select returns data without schema (except for string)
#book2  http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/title   "David Copperfield"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string>
#book2  http://www.example.com/Int32    789
#book2  http://www.example.com/Double   23
#book2  http://www.example.com/Float    23.0
#book2  http://www.example.com/Decimal  0
#book2  http://www.example.com/DateTime     2014-06-17T12:08:26.767595+03:00
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE books (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR(255), int_value INT, double_value DOUBLE PRECISION, float_value FLOAT, decimal_value DECIMAL(10, 2), datetime_value TIMESTAMP);

INSERT INTO books (id, title, int_value, double_value, float_value, decimal_value, datetime_value) VALUES (1, 'David Copperfield', 789, '23'::DOUBLE PRECISION, '23'::FLOAT, '0'::DECIMAL, '2014-06-17 12:08:26.767595');
INSERT INTO books (id, title, int_value, double_value, float_value, decimal_value, datetime_value) VALUES (2, 'Great Expectations', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL);
SELECT id, title, COALESCE(int_value, 0) AS int_value, COALESCE(double_value, 0.0) AS double_value FROM books WHERE int_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, title, float_value, decimal_value, datetime_value FROM books WHERE datetime_value > '2014-01-01 00:00:00';
key_bug_features: INSERT command ignores non-string literal schemas
